name: Invoice Gmail to Sheets — Search Gmail, Claude extracts data, save to Sheets
description: Searches Gmail for invoice emails, uses Claude AI to extract invoice data (amounts, dates, vendors, line items), and saves the structured data to Google Sheets for reconciliation tracking.

source.originalName: Invoices from Gmail to Drive and Google Sheets

gmailListKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing emails

gmailGetKey.description: Gmail connection key for getting email details

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving invoice data

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for invoice processing notifications

spreadsheetUrl.description: Google Sheets URL for invoice tracking (columns: Date, Vendor, InvoiceNumber, Amount, Currency, DueDate, Status)

sheetName.description: Sheet tab name for invoice data

gmailQuery.default: subject:(invoice OR receipt OR billing) has:attachment newer_than:7d
gmailQuery.description: Gmail search query to find invoice emails

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of emails to process

steps.name: Parse email list and extract IDs
Fetch email details in a loop
Compile email content for AI extraction
Run Claude AI to extract invoice data
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Save invoice data to Google Sheets in a loop
Build Slack Block Kit invoice summary
